parameters.name: lookup_barcode
parameters.description: Look up a food product by its barcode (EAN-8 or EAN-13). Returns nutrition facts, Nutri-Score, NOVA group, Eco-Score, allergens, ingredients, and labels. Parameter: barcode (the barcode number, required)

schema.description: The product barcode number (EAN-8 or EAN-13)

parameters.name: search_food
parameters.description: Search for food products by name or keyword. Returns a list of matching products with nutrition facts, Nutri-Score, allergens, and barcodes. Parameters: query (search term like 'Nutella' or 'oat milk', required), limit (number of results 1-10, optional, default 5)

value.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Search term — product name, brand, or food type', 'string') }}

schema.description: Search term — product name, brand, or food type
Number of results to return (1-10, default 5)
